title: <<COMPONENTNAME>> southbound adapter configuration
description: The configuration <<COMPONENTNAME>> itself understands: the object at `component.global` in an EdgeCommons config file. Each entry of `component.instances[]` — one field device / endpoint — is validated against `#/$defs/instance`. The library envelope (logging, messaging, metricEmission, heartbeat, streaming, credentials, parameters, health, hierarchy, identity, topic, tags) is owned by the canonical schema (schema/edgecommons-config-schema.json) and is deliberately NOT redeclared here. This schema is derived from the scaffold's example adapter config (test-configs/<<COMPONENTNAME>>.json) and the keys the adapter reads. Replace the protocol-agnostic placeholders with your protocol's real keys as you implement it, and keep `additionalProperties: false` so a typo'd or unknown key is caught at deploy time instead of being silently ignored.

defaults.description: Defaults applied to every instance unless the instance overrides them.

publishIntervalMs.description: Milliseconds between northbound publishes of collected signal values.

samplingRateMs.description: How often the adapter samples a signal on the device, in milliseconds (the requested rate for subscriptions; the poll period for polled protocols).

queueSize.description: Per-signal queue depth the adapter asks the device/server to hold for undelivered samples.

healthThresholds.description: Thresholds that drive the standard `southbound_health` metric (contract §5).

staleSignalSecs.description: A signal with no fresh sample for this many seconds counts toward the `staleSignals` measure.

instance.title: <<COMPONENTNAME>> device instance
instance.description: One entry of `component.instances[]`: a single device/endpoint with its own connection and subscriptions. Each instance runs on its own worker thread and publishes to its own UNS data topics (ecv1/{device}/{component}/{instance}/data/{signalPath}).

id.description: Unique instance identifier. It is the `{instance}` token of this instance's UNS topics and is stamped into the envelope identity and into `body.device.instance`.

adapter.description: Protocol identifier emitted in `body.device.adapter` of every SouthboundSignalUpdate (for example `opcua`, `modbus`, `ethernetip`).

connection.description: How to reach this device. `endpoint` is the only key the scaffold reads; add your protocol's own connection keys (credentials, security policy, unit id, timeouts) alongside it.

endpoint.description: Protocol endpoint URL/address for this device, e.g. `opc.tcp://host:4840` or `modbus://host:502`.

publishIntervalMs.description: Milliseconds between northbound publishes for this device.

samplingRateMs.description: Device sampling/poll rate for this device, in milliseconds.

queueSize.description: Per-signal queue depth for this device.

publish.description: How updates from this device are batched northbound. Topics are minted by the UNS builder and are never configured here.

batchMs.description: Coalescing window in milliseconds: samples arriving within the window ride in one SouthboundSignalUpdate. 0 publishes every change immediately.

write.description: The southbound write (device command) surface for this device.

enabled.description: Whether this adapter accepts writes toward the device. Keep false until the write path is implemented and authorized.

subscriptions.description: The signal sets this instance subscribes to (or polls). Each entry names an include/exclude ruleset over the device's address space.

id.description: Identifier for this subscription, used in logs and health reporting.

include.description: Rules selecting the signals to subscribe to. Evaluated before `exclude`.

namespace.description: Protocol-native address-space namespace the rule applies to (for example the OPC UA namespace index). Omit for protocols with a flat address space.

match.description: Regular expression matched against the protocol-native signal address/identifier. `.*` selects every signal in the namespace.

samplingRateMs.description: Sampling/poll rate for the signals this rule matches. Overrides the instance and global defaults.

queueSize.description: Queue depth for the signals this rule matches. Overrides the instance and global defaults.

deadband.description: Change filter: suppress samples whose value moved less than this from the last published one.

type.description: None publishes every change; Absolute compares against `value` in engineering units; Percent compares against `value` as a percentage of the signal's range.

value.description: The deadband magnitude. 0 with type Absolute publishes every change.
